# External CSS starters

Full external themes for the **editor UI** belong in **`~/.luna/theme/style/`**.

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [crossplatnote-theme.example.css](./crossplatnote-theme.example.css) | Minimal Luna token overrides (dark + light) |
| [theme-example/style/](../../theme-example/README.md#external-css-themes) | Tokyo Night, Paper Ink, and other complete themes |

See [external-css.md](../external-css.md) for variables, selectors, and cascade rules.
